title: 有馬記念の後に・アクナレッジメント

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has won the showdown against her
sister at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Narita Brian comes over to congratulate her,
Biwa Hayahide has one question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Am I a big sister you can be proud of now?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's response? "I've always been proud
of you." Today, our winning equation has finally
given Biwa Hayahide the victory she's dreamed of
for so long.
